name: The Void Sentinel
description: A high-difficulty encryption challenge appears. Solve it to earn massive rewards.

name: Convergence Day
description: All tasks give 2x XP for the next 24 hours.

name: Agent Rebellion
description: A rogue agent challenges you with a secret quest. Complete it for a unique badge.

name: Speed Trial
description: Complete 3 tasks in under 1 hour for a massive XP bonus.

name: Master Class
description: AGNES gives a master-class session on advanced tool usage.

name: System Corruption
description: The UI glitches into corrupted mode. Solve the puzzle to restore order.

name: Zero-Day Alert
description: A critical vulnerability is announced in the news. Analyze and respond.

name: Shadow Trial
description: A multi-step challenge across all skill tracks. Complete to guarantee a level up.

name: Mystery Cache
description: A mysterious data cache is discovered. Open it for a random power unlock.

name: Streak Celebration
description: 7-day login streak achieved! Claim your rare cosmetic reward.
